title: Example of two-path protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"50r1a","text":"This is an example of a protocol that have a common first steps, then forks into two different ones.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 10 µL of Solution A into a beacker
Prepare 100 mL of 0.9% NaCl Add 20 mL of PBS 0.1 Molarity (M), (adjust pH to 7)
Let it cool down and store in a -80 °C freezer
proceed with the experiment by injecting the solution on an Agilent 7890B GC system
creator: Cleyde V Helena
